response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar
ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_id : varchar : FK
ENTITY AirplaneModel
PK model_name
ATTR model_name : varchar : PK
ENTITY Airplane
PK registration
ATTR registration : varchar : PK
ATTR model_name : varchar : FK
ENTITY BaggageBelt
PK belt_id
ATTR belt_id : varchar : PK
ATTR destination_airport_id : varchar : FK
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id, flight_date
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK
ATTR airline_id : varchar : FK
ATTR origin_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR destination_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR baggage_belt_id : varchar : FK
ATTR registration : varchar : FK
ENTITY FlightStatus
PK flight_id, flight_date, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar
ATTR status_description : varchar
ATTR status_date : date : PK
ATTR status_time : time : PK
ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_member_id
ATTR crew_member_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR crew_role : varchar
ENTITY PassengerFlight
PK passenger_id, flight_id, flight_date
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
ATTR seat_number : varchar
ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK crew_member_id, flight_id, flight_date
ATTR crew_member_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
REL Airport -> City : 0..N -> 1 : FK=city_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 0..N -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_id
REL Flight -> BaggageBelt : 0..N -> 0..1 : FK=baggage_belt_id
REL Flight -> Airplane : 0..N -> 1 : FK=registration
REL Airplane -> AirplaneModel : 0..N -> 1 : FK=model_name
REL FlightStatus -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id,flight_date
REL PassengerFlight -> Passenger : 0..N -> 1 : FK=passenger_id
REL PassengerFlight -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id,flight_date
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 0..N -> 1 : FK=crew_member_id
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id,flight_date
